content: Brain bootstrapped for TheWytching. AISLING_BRAIN_SPEC_v2.1.md and AISLING_BRAIN_ADDENDUM_A.md read fully. Agent_Context.md seeded all FROZEN memory. 8 decisions crystallised. 6 dead ends crystallised. 3 patterns crystallised. 3 cold episodes written. Full Tools/Brain/ directory structure created. global_rules, decision_rules, ricky_model loaded. No active missions. No broken modules. All source compiled clean as of 2026-02-28. Step 1 complete. Step 2 ready — awaiting first command. Tokens consumed: ~8,200. Remaining: ~113,800.

Step 1a (hierarchy health check) added to boot protocol. global_rules.md v2.3→v2.4. boot.txt updated with full 8-step sequence including 1a. generate_hierarchy.py updated: added check_staleness() function, --check-only mode (exit 0=current, exit 1=stale), stale trigger printed on full run header. session_summary.md updated with Session Header Template (every WARM compression must record hierarchy status). Initial hierarchy generated for TheWytching: 23 classes, 0 broken, 0 parse errors, status=clean. hierarchy_health.json written to Tools/Brain/. Highest blast radius: IWytchInteractable (3).

DEC-009 written to FROZEN memory. Source: live hierarchy (23 classes, 2026-03-09T01:46:20Z). IWytchInteractable identified as highest blast-radius class in project (size 3). Direct dependents confirmed from hierarchy.json: IWytchCarryable, IWytchWorkSite, UForemanSurveyComponent. Decision: PROTECTED class — any modification requires hierarchy recheck + audit of all dependents + explicit Ricky approval. Protection flag also written to modules/interfaces/status.json protected_classes[]. Cold episode appended. IWytchInteractable added to working_memory watching[]. This is the first hierarchy-data-derived decision — establishes the pattern that high-blast-radius classes get protection flags on every hierarchy run.

HND-001 written to handshake.json pending_for_aik. First contact with Aisling_BP — introduction handshake. Content: project identity, C++ foundation inventory, BP asset inventory (BP_FOREMAN_V2, BP_WorkStation, ST_Foreman, SOD_Build), do-not-touch list, active work summary (Step 2), communication protocol. Requested ack to pending_for_rider: surface confirmation, BP asset visibility, current BP state report. agent_roster.json updated: aisling_aik display_name updated to Aisling_BP, ricky_calls_her field added, surface updated to Unreal Editor (AIK/NeoStack). Awaiting ack.

AISLING_BP_BOOT.md created at [ProjectRoot]/AISLING_BP_BOOT.md. This is Aisling_BP's single boot entry point — replaces the old Agent_Context.md as her seed file. Contains: 5-step boot sequence, brain file map, handshake protocol, project identity, BP asset inventory table, DO NOT TOUCH list, critical Blueprint rules, C++ foundation reference, active work status, approval matrix. Maintained by aisling_rider — updated whenever project state changes significantly. handshake.json updated: bp_boot_file field added to protocol block. HND-001 updated to point Aisling_BP to AISLING_BP_BOOT.md. boot.txt updated: maintenance responsibility section added.

Incremental backup system established. Tools/backup.ps1 created — robocopy, excludes Binaries/DerivedDataCache/Intermediate/Saved/.git/.vs/.idea. Destination: F:\TheWytching (SATA 2, 2.2TB free). First incremental run confirmed: 1 file copied (backup.ps1 itself), 3242 files already current, exit code 3 (clean). Backup Rule added to global_rules.md. Session end backup step added to boot.txt. Triggers: session end, new C++ files, FROZEN crystallisation, hierarchy regen, multi-module change sets.
